{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Broom Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is known as the [[Broom Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
